queries.question: What are the audience reviews on Pulp Fiction?
queries.sql:
SELECT AudienceReviews
FROM Reviews
 JOIN Film ON Film.ID = Reviews.FilmId  WHERE Title = 'Pulp Fiction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?audiencereviews WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Review .
  ?film a :Films .
  ?reviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?reviews p:AudienceReviews ?audiencereviews .
  ?film p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Pulp Fiction")
}

queries.question: What was the review of Pulp Fiction?
queries.sql:
SELECT Opinion
FROM Reviews
 JOIN Film ON Film.ID = Reviews.FilmId  WHERE Title = 'Pulp Fiction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?opinion WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Review .
  ?film a :Films .
  ?reviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?reviews p:Opinion ?opinion .
  ?film p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Pulp Fiction")
}

queries.question: What was the review of Pulp Fiction?
queries.sql:
SELECT Opinion, AudienceReviews
FROM Reviews
 JOIN Film ON Film.ID = Reviews.FilmId  WHERE Title = 'Pulp Fiction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?opinion ?audiencereviews WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Review .
  ?film a :Films .
  ?reviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?reviews p:Opinion ?opinion .
  ?reviews p:AudienceReviews ?audiencereviews .
  ?film p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Pulp Fiction")
}

queries.question: What was the audience review and critical opinion for the drama film?
queries.sql:
SELECT Opinion, AudienceReviews
FROM Reviews
JOIN Film ON Film.ID = Reviews.FilmId  WHERE Genre = 'Drama'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?opinion ?audiencereviews WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Review .
  ?film a :Films .
  ?reviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?reviews p:Opinion ?opinion .
  ?reviews p:AudienceReviews ?audiencereviews .
  ?film p:Genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Drama")
}
